case_title: SYSTEMATIC NATIONAL COLLECTIONS, INC. vs. BAUTISTA, NORIELYN et al

docket_entries.description: STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF APR-17-1998, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT, OSC TO PLTF'S ATTY DANIEL S ROSENBERG. HEARING SET FOR MAY-27-1998 AT 02:30 PM IN DEPT 212 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
